title: About
name: Doug Fessler
headline: Senior Gameplay Engineer
bio: I'm a Senior Gameplay Engineer focused on the systems behind the game: mission logic, cinematic tooling, progression, and the frameworks that everything else depends on.
I grew up making games with RPG Maker, taught myself C++, and haven't stopped building. I've shipped on PC, console, and mobile, from three-person pitches at FireForge to Hearthstone at Blizzard.

stats.label: focus
stats.value: Mission Systems / Open World / Gameplay / IGC

highlights.title: Last Sentinel
highlights.description: Mission systems, IGC framework, and cinematic tooling for a narrative open-world action game.

highlights.title: Hearthstone
highlights.description: Solo adventures, journal systems, quests, and achievements across eight major expansions.

highlights.title: Ghostbusters
highlights.description: AI and gameplay ability systems on the official Ghostbusters tie-in for PC, PS4, and Xbox One.
